falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key trendline would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a potential bullish trend contrary to the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 50+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a potential reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200%+ of the 30-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume surge would indicate a forced liquidation or massive buying pressure, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a clear directional move.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
